fact_nuggets.text: Stalwart redirects here. For the skill in Pokemon Masters EX, see Stalwart (Skill). Stalwart (Japanese: Staunch) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Duraludon and Archaludon.
Signature Ability of Duraludon And Archaludon

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Stalwart makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Stalwart has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Stalwart makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ).
Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
